name: 21_Iris_Classification_SVM_Iris_ML
query: Ninaomba mradi wa kuainisha aina za iris kwa kutumia seti ya data ya Iris na kisanidi cha Support Vector Machine (SVM) kilichotekelezwa katika `src/model.py`. Mradi unapaswa kusawazisha data na kufanya uteuzi wa vipengele katika `src/data_loader.py`. Itarekodi usahihi wa uainishaji na kuihifadhi kama `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt`, na itazalisha na kuhifadhi matriki ya mkanganyiko kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`. Pia itaunda programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` kwa kutumia Streamlit kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`. Ukurasa wa wavuti unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, na maelezo mafupi ya modeli kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

requirements.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.
Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa Streamlit unapaswa kuwa rafiki kwa mtumiaji, ukiwaruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza kwa urahisi vipengele tofauti vya utendaji wa modeli.
Maelezo mafupi ya modeli yanapaswa kujumuishwa kwenye ukurasa wa wavuti, kusaidia watumiaji kuelewa jinsi kisanidi cha SVM kinavyofanya kazi.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> The provided code does not show actual use of the Iris dataset. In `src/data_loader.py`, `load_dataset()` only returns a placeholder dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and does not import or load Iris data (e.g., from `sklearn.datasets`). The trajectory evidence also explicitly states there is no direct evidence mentioning use of the Iris dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inasawazishwa ili kuhakikisha thamani za vipengele ziko ndani ya kiwango sawa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` does not implement actual data standardization. The file only contains placeholder logic: `load_dataset()` returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and `build_transforms()` returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no real scaler import or application to dataset features in the provided code, so the requirement is not met based on the current file contents.

judge_stats.criteria: Uteuzi wa vipengele unafanywa ili kutambua vipengele muhimu katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/data_loader.py` only lists the requirement text in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, but the actual code does not implement feature selection. `load_dataset()` just returns `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}`, and `build_transforms()` returns placeholder strings like `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no feature-selection logic, no selected-feature output, and no execution evidence confirming important features were identified.

<UNSATISFIED> `src/model.py` does not implement an SVM classifier. The file only defines metadata (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns `"model placeholder"`. There is no SVM import, no classifier construction (e.g. `SVC`), and no training/inference logic in the provided code.

<UNSATISFIED> The file `results/metrics/classification_accuracy.txt` exists, but its actual content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which is a placeholder rather than a stored classification accuracy value. This does not demonstrate that the accuracy metric was properly saved.

judge_stats.criteria: Matriki ya mkanganyiko inazalishwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`.

reason: <SATISFIED> The workspace contains `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png`, and the trajectory evidence states the confusion matrix was generated and saved to that exact path without reported save or execution errors. Although the image content could not be opened in the provided inspection, the project evidence supports that the file was produced and stored as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Programu ya wavuti inayoshirikiana katika `src/app.py` imeundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" kuonyesha matokeo ya uainishaji na utendaji wa modeli, na picha zitahifadhiwa katika `results/figures/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> `src/app.py` does not implement a Streamlit web app. The file only defines constants and a `main()` function returning a dictionary; it contains no `import streamlit`, no Streamlit UI calls, and no code to display classification results or model performance. Although `results/figures/confusion_matrix.png` exists, there is no evidence in `src/app.py` that it loads or showcases images from `results/figures/`.
